## About Me {#about}

::: {.split-section reverse}
::: {.split-text}
### Professional Profile

I am Sophia Sufei Chen, a Business Studies student specialising in Business Analytics at Dublin City University. This ePortfolio presents my academic background, technical skills, and professional development in a clear and professional format.

I am particularly interested in business analytics, customer insight, and using data-informed thinking to support better business decisions in real organisational settings.
:::

::: {.split-image}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-image}
:::
:::
